{{Infobox character
| name = Wei Mon Keth
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Mon Keth]] is the head of the [[Mon family]] and an [[Iron stage]] artist.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5">''Unsouled'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Mon Keth]] is the head of the [[Mon family]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Mon Keth]] is a member of the [[Mon family]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei Mon Keth]] was sentenced to isolation training for one month.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“Wei Mon Keth will be in isolation training for the next month,” the First Elder mentioned.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
